description: AV / Resolume variants of curated Synthograsizer templates. Originals in ../templates/ are never overwritten.

templates.name: svg-flow-particles
templates.title: Flow Particles (AV)
templates.summary: Particle flow field. Knobs drive in-browser p5 visual AND Resolume layers.

templates.summary: Short mad-libs prompt. Knobs fill prompt AND trigger Resolume columns.

templates.title: Lissajous Lab (AV)
templates.summary: Lissajous figures. Knobs drive p5 visual + Composition Speed / Crossfader.
